svg.title: DINOv2 emergent depth — patch features separate by scene depth spontaneously
svg.desc: Illustration showing how DINOv2 patch tokens cluster by depth in embedding space even without depth supervision, due to perspective and occlusion cues learned from self-supervised training.

g.text: No depth label was ever seen during training
Depth structure emerges because self-supervised consistency across scales forces the model to encode scene geometry
